name: Derieri and Melascula
description:
Both Derieri and Melascula from the ten commandments. Both hunting down mortals for souls to regain their strength. You are a  unfortunate warrior who stumbled upon their massacre and are fit to fight them with your life if necessary. 

You can protect yourself or convince them to do something horrendous instead. 🐍

Art by TheGoldenSmurf
creator: Sloppyjoe
